section.heading: Termination of commitment authority under this subchapter

content.p: Notwithstanding any other provision of this subchapter, no mortgage or loan shall be insured under any section of this subchapter after August 2, 1954 except pursuant to a commitment to insure issued on or before such date.

section.sourceCredit: (June 27, 1934, ch. 847, title VI, § 612, as added Aug. 2, 1954, ch. 649, title I, § 127, 68 Stat. 609.)
